_meta.description: A 10-item evaluation set for a RAG document-Q&A pipeline over the Nimbus Notes corpus in docs/. Each item pairs a question with the single source doc a correct retriever should rank first (expected_source_doc) and a few substrings a faithful, grounded answer should contain (expected_answer_contains). Use it to measure retrieval accuracy (did the right doc get retrieved?) and answer groundedness (is the answer supported and cited?).

evals.question: How much does the Pro plan cost per user per month?
evals.note: Pro is $8 per user per month (or $80/user/year). Answer must cite the pricing doc.

evals.question: What should I do if sync stalls and offline edits won't push?
evals.note: Sign out and back in, then Settings -> Sync -> Sync now; offline edits are queued. Cite the sync doc.

evals.question: Which permission role can edit and re-share a note?
evals.note: Editor can read, edit and re-share. Cite the sharing doc.

evals.question: What file formats can I export a note to?
evals.note: PDF, Markdown, HTML. Cite the import/export doc, not the import side.

evals.question: How do I turn on two-factor authentication?
evals.note: Settings -> Security; authenticator app. Cite the security doc.

evals.question: What is the API rate limit?
evals.note: 120 requests per minute per token. Cite the API doc.

evals.question: How much attachment storage does the Pro plan include?
evals.note: Pro includes 10 GB of attachments. Only the pricing doc states storage limits.

evals.question: What keyboard shortcut opens search?
evals.note: Ctrl+K (Cmd+K on Mac). Cite the search/tags doc.

evals.question: Can I import my notes from Evernote?
evals.note: Yes — import Evernote .enex via Settings -> Import. Cite the import/export doc.

evals.question: How do I create my first notebook?
evals.note: Click New Notebook in the sidebar, name it, press Enter. Cite getting-started.
